items.text:
Foreman! Explain to me,
how the first pocket we have managed to open
in FOUR YEARS,
somehow has old buildings inside?

And you came down here,
you saw this,
And you didn't tell me immediately.

A re-used pocket,
no-one's heard of such a thing!

You chose the locus
by which this pocket was opened,

I must now presume some ulterior motive.
Whose pocket was this, before, and why?
Our fieldmen are currently gathering information --

Yes, yes, naturally.
As diligence, I must now dispatch
observers through the rest of the mine
to see what else you aren't telling us.

It's very dangerous down there,
and even just up here --

Remember that I report directly
to Grandfather now.

You report to me.
Any further games and you'll report to nobody.

Her Archaunt would be advised
that the Foreman's skills are greatly --

Shut it.
I don't know what you thought you were doing here,
but to anyone with half a brain,
this ... looks ... really bad.
Let's hope you're just trying to get famous or something.

Expect my team in a week from today.
Unbelievable.
